rules.subject: credit_score
rules.raw_text: Each applicant must have a credit score of at least 680.

rules.subject: coverage_amount
rules.raw_text: The maximum coverage amount for any single policy shall not exceed $2,000,000.

rules.subject: credit_score
rules.condition: no more than 15% of the total portfolio value may consist of policies for applicants with credit scores between 680 and 700.
rules.raw_text: The applicant must have a credit score of at least 680, provided that no more than 15% of the total portfolio value may consist of policies for applicants with credit scores between 680 and 700.

rules.subject: credit_score
exceptions: if the applicant has a co-signer with a credit score above 750: 45%
rules.raw_text: The debt-to-income ratio shall not exceed 40%, or 45% if the applicant has a co-signer with a credit score above 750.

rules.subject: overdue_payment_days
rules.raw_text: The applicant must not have any payment more than 30 days overdue as of the Review Date.

rules.subject: policy_rule
rules.raw_text: The applicant must reside in the United States or its territories.

rules.subject: annual_income
exceptions: the applicant is enrolled in an approved assistance program
rules.raw_text: No applicant shall have an annual income below $35,000, unless the applicant is enrolled in an approved assistance program, in which case the minimum income shall be $25,000.
